suggestions.text: How text based video games taught language to a generation - this is where I first learnt the word obsidian. What are its roots? In the early Might and Magic series (MM3 and above), it was the quality of item. Now obsidian is a standard immemorial... and my note taking app

I find your write bothing haunting and enchanting.

What languages for the basis of of our language? Do syllables contain meaning across the different dialogues - are there commonalities? I would love it if you wrote an article about this
